title: Data Lake Publisher (Hexagon AP)
content: Built a Data Lake Publisher on PySpark and Spark Streaming ingesting CDC events from 300+ source tables with end-to-end latency under 1 minute. Included schema evolution handling, compacted micro-batches, and metadata-driven orchestration.

title: Snowflake Tuning Case Study
content: Rewrote heavy analytic queries and clustered key usage, dropping runtime from 14 minutes to under 4 minutes and saving approximately $18,000 per month in compute. Strategies included query profiling, materialized views, and warehouse right-sizing.

title: Real-time Financial Model
content: Designed a real-time financial data model using Kinesis and Spark Streaming to sustain over 10,000 events per second with no data loss, applying partitioning strategies and idempotent consumers.
